scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5005 --reload
scripts.dev:worker: cd apps/worker && uv run python worker.py
scripts.dev:flower: cd apps/worker && uv run celery -A shared.core.celery_app flower --port=5555
scripts.api:export-schema: cd apps/api && uv run python scripts/export_openapi.py
